title: Why are Honkers so fixated on living in the city centre?

replies.msg:
In other countries, smart people live in the suburb
tjats where smart people live
cheaper rent
Better environment
you got trees around you
after all what’s better than being surrounded by trees and freshly mowed grass
honkers are so obsessed with living in the city
on the busiest street with all the traffics and pollution
all the rats and cockroach and ridiculous rent
whats wrong with living in the country side
time for you guys to change your habit
it’s okay to be away from the city
you might ask what about my job??
well that’s a valid question
but I don’t give a fuck
find a better job
you won’t starve
